Homestead Home Loans

FHA loans in Homestead, Florida

At the southern end of Miami-Dade, Homestead is one of the most affordable ways into the South Florida market, with a steady supply of new construction and a strong base of first-time and family buyers. That combination — lower prices than the rest of Dade plus new homes — makes it an excellent FHA market, where 3.5% down stretches further than almost anywhere else in the county.

Miami-Dade County FHA limit (1-unit)$667,000

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Homestead

Miami-Dade County is a designated high-cost area, so its 2026 single-family FHA limit is $667,000, above the $541,287 statewide floor — meaning you can finance higher-priced Homestead homes than in most of Florida. Confirm Miami-Dade County's exact limit with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup. Because Homestead's prices sit well below much of Miami-Dade, FHA's reach covers the large majority of local homes.

Affordable South Florida homeownership with FHA

Homestead is where many South Florida renters finally buy. Its new-construction communities are ideal FHA candidates — they pass the appraisal easily and sit comfortably under the loan limit — perfect for first-time buyers. Pair FHA with Florida and Miami-Dade assistance and gift funds to minimize your cash to close. For townhomes or condos, confirm FHA approval via our condo guide.

Down payment help for Homestead buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Homestead buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Miami-Dade County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Homestead

We help buyers throughout Homestead and Miami-Dade County, including Homestead, Florida City, and the Redland. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Homestead (Miami-Dade County) for 2026?+
Miami-Dade is a high-cost county, so its 2026 FHA limit is $667,000, above the $541,287 Florida floor. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Why is Homestead good for FHA buyers?+
Homestead offers some of the most affordable prices in Miami-Dade plus lots of new construction, so FHA's 3.5% down goes a long way here.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Homestead?+
Yes — newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Homestead?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and down payment assistance.
Do you serve Homestead and the rest of Miami-Dade?+
Yes — Homestead, Florida City, Miami, Hialeah, and surrounding Miami-Dade communities.
